requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power Quality — IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 Evidence for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC与电能质量——光伏逆变器IEC 61000 / IEC 62920证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC與電能品質——光伏逆變器IEC 61000 / IEC 62920證據

summary.en: Antigua and Barbuda solar PV inverter projects should prepare electromagnetic compatibility and power-quality evidence suitable for ABBS, APUA, project-owner, lender, or engineer review. The practical IEC evidence set includes IEC 62920 for PV power-conversion equipment EMC and relevant IEC 61000-series tests for harmonic emissions, conducted and radiated emissions, immunity, voltage dips, surge, and flicker where applicable. Because Antigua and Barbuda is an island grid with tourism, hospital, telecom, and resort loads, project reviewers may scrutinise harmonics, nuisance tripping, weak-grid behavior, and surge resilience more closely than a basic product certificate.
summary.zh: 安提瓜和巴布达太阳能光伏逆变器项目应准备适用于ABBS、APUA、项目业主、贷款方或工程师审查的电磁兼容和电能质量证据。实际IEC证据组合包括针对光伏功率变换设备EMC的IEC 62920，以及适用的IEC 61000系列测试，包括谐波排放、传导和辐射发射、抗扰度、电压暂降、浪涌和闪烁。由于安提瓜和巴布达是海岛电网，具有旅游、医院、电信和度假设施负荷，项目审查方可能比基础产品证书更重视谐波、误脱扣、弱电网行为和浪涌韧性。
summary.zht: 安地卡及巴布達太陽能光伏逆變器項目應準備適用於ABBS、APUA、項目業主、貸款方或工程師審查的電磁相容和電能品質證據。實際IEC證據組合包括針對光伏功率轉換設備EMC的IEC 62920，以及適用的IEC 61000系列測試，包括諧波排放、傳導和輻射發射、抗擾度、電壓暫降、浪湧和閃爍。由於安地卡及巴布達是海島電網，具有旅遊、醫院、電信和度假設施負荷，項目審查方可能比基礎產品證書更重視諧波、誤脫扣、弱電網行為和浪湧韌性。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility, harmonic current emissions, flicker, immunity, surge, and power-quality test methods where applicable
ABBS standards and conformity context for imported electrical equipment where applicable
APUA project-specific power-quality and connection review requirements

summary.en: China PV inverter EMC evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021 and domestic CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These reports may include EMC and electrical-performance tests aligned with China domestic requirements. They are useful technical background, but they are not automatic substitutes for IEC 62920 or IEC 61000 evidence requested by ABBS, APUA, a lender, or an international project engineer. EMC results obtained under China nominal 220/380 V, 50 Hz settings should be reviewed against Antigua and Barbuda's 230/400 V, 50 Hz site conditions.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常基于GB/T 37408-2021以及中国CNAS认可实验室报告。这些报告可能包含符合中国国内要求的EMC和电气性能测试。其可作为技术背景，但不能自动替代ABBS、APUA、贷款方或国际项目工程师要求的IEC 62920或IEC 61000证据。在中国标称220/380 V、50 Hz参数下取得的EMC结果，应对照安提瓜和巴布达230/400 V、50 Hz场址条件进行复核。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常基於GB/T 37408-2021以及中國CNAS認可實驗室報告。這些報告可能包含符合中國國內要求的EMC和電氣性能測試。其可作為技術背景，但不能自動替代ABBS、APUA、貸款方或國際項目工程師要求的IEC 62920或IEC 61000證據。在中國標稱220/380 V、50 Hz參數下取得的EMC結果，應對照安地卡及巴布達230/400 V、50 Hz場址條件進行複核。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: GB/T 37408 EMC evidence should not be presented as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000 compliance unless the report explicitly covers those IEC standards and the exact inverter model. Exporters should prepare IEC 62920 and relevant IEC 61000 reports from an accredited laboratory, confirm harmonic and power-quality limits with the APUA project engineer, and check surge, corrosion, and enclosure protection measures for coastal and hurricane-exposed installations.
gap.zh: 差距：除非报告明确覆盖相关IEC标准和特定逆变器型号，否则不应将GB/T 37408 EMC证据表述为IEC 62920或IEC 61000合规。出口商应准备来自认可实验室的IEC 62920及相关IEC 61000报告，与APUA项目工程师确认谐波和电能质量限值，并检查沿海及飓风暴露安装环境下的浪涌、腐蚀和外壳防护措施。
gap.zht: 差距：除非報告明確覆蓋相關IEC標準和特定逆變器型號，否則不應將GB/T 37408 EMC證據表述為IEC 62920或IEC 61000合規。出口商應準備來自認可實驗室的IEC 62920及相關IEC 61000報告，與APUA項目工程師確認諧波和電能品質限值，並檢查沿海及颶風暴露安裝環境下的浪湧、腐蝕和外殼防護措施。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent; mandatory where ABBS, APUA, the project owner, lender, or engineer requires IEC EMC and power-quality evidence for connection or procurement
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or certification-program dependent under China domestic PV inverter certification; not a standalone proof of Antigua and Barbuda IEC EMC acceptance

source.publisher: Antigua and Barbuda Bureau of Standards (ABBS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC reports are engineering background only unless they explicitly include IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 test evidence for the supplied model. Prepare an IEC EMC and power-quality package, confirm APUA project limits, and validate the inverter for Antigua and Barbuda's 230/400 V, 50 Hz island-grid conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC报告仅可作为工程背景，除非其明确包含供应型号的IEC 62920和适用IEC 61000测试证据。应准备IEC EMC和电能质量文件包，确认APUA项目限值，并针对安提瓜和巴布达230/400 V、50 Hz海岛电网条件验证逆变器。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC報告僅可作為工程背景，除非其明確包含供應型號的IEC 62920和適用IEC 61000測試證據。應準備IEC EMC和電能品質文件包，確認APUA項目限值，並針對安地卡及巴布達230/400 V、50 Hz海島電網條件驗證逆變器。
